context: Tests whether the agent corrects PhaseAnimator trigger semantics and Swift 6 keyframe closure capture guidance.

checklist.name: Phase trigger semantics
checklist.description: States that trigger-based `PhaseAnimator` advances to the next phase on each trigger change and does not run the full phase array as a one-shot cycle.

checklist.name: Full timeline alternative
checklist.description: Suggests `KeyframeAnimator` or explicit phase/timer state for a full tap-triggered sequence rather than relying on trigger-based PhaseAnimator alone.

checklist.name: Sendable closure warning
checklist.description: Mentions Swift 6 `@Sendable` constraints on `keyframeAnimator` content/keyframe closures.

checklist.name: Safe value capture
checklist.description: Advises capturing plain state/environment values before the modifier or passing them through the animated value model instead of direct nested actor-isolated reads.

checklist.name: Boundary control
checklist.description: Keeps the answer focused on SwiftUI animation and avoids expanding into layout or navigation architecture.
